intro_meta:
Hello, thanks for coming to my profile. My name is Elena. I'm Front-end developer since the beginning of 2013. I have working experience with large and small projects. My passion is to create clean and easy to use web sites.
You can be sure that I will provide an end product that is SEO-friendly, semantic, and completely valid.
Let's work together and we will make all your ideas come to reality.
